3972.title: Allow selecting chat settings section from tablet view
3972.body: Tablet users had to scroll through the entire settings page. This change adds a section selector so users can jump directly to the part they need.

3992.title: Add pagination support for reading and writing workflows
3992.body: Workflow lists could become too large to handle efficiently. This change adds backend pagination so list pages load more reliably and large accounts can browse workflows without long waits.

4001.title: Add web view component for Android update alerts
4001.body: Android update alerts were limited in how much detail they could show. This introduces a web view so release notes and update instructions can display more clearly inside the app.

4015.title: Fix workflow search keywords not updating
4015.body: Users could change workflow content but search results still reflected the old keywords. This fix refreshes search keywords when workflows change.
4015.linkedIssueTitle: Workflow search still shows old results after editing
4015.linkedIssueBody: After editing a workflow, the search page continued to show stale keywords and users could not find the updated version.

4018.title: Show Connections and Voice pages inside Chat settings
4018.body: Users had trouble understanding where chat connections and voice settings lived. This change surfaces those pages inside chat settings and adds help information to make setup clearer.

4019.title: Improve quick actions when tapping list items in tables
4019.body: Quick actions on table rows were difficult to discover on touch devices. This change makes row selection behave more clearly so users can reach hover-style quick actions by tapping.

4023.title: Fix Slack action label on schedule edit page
4023.body: The schedule edit page could show missing or unclear Slack action labels. This fix restores the label and adds a warning when an unsupported action is missing its label.
4023.linkedIssueTitle: Slack schedule page does not show action name clearly
4023.linkedIssueBody: Users editing scheduled Slack actions could not tell which action was configured because the label was blank or misleading.

4025.title: Fix triggers for LegacyModel providers
4025.body: LegacyModel providers were not firing triggers correctly in some flows. This patch restores expected trigger behavior.
4025.linkedIssueTitle: LegacyModel provider triggers do not start workflows
4025.linkedIssueBody: Users relying on LegacyModel providers found that some workflows never started because the trigger stage did not fire.

33912.body: 问题描述 OpenClaw 2026.3.2 版本中，通过 Feishu 通道发送文件时，中文文件名被转码显示为乱码。此问题在 2026.3.1 及之前版本正常。 复现步骤 使用 message 工具发送文件，filename 参数包含中文，例如： { "action": "send", "filePath": "武汉15座山登山信息汇总.csv", "filename": "武汉15座山登山信息汇总.csv" } 在 Feishu 群中查看，文件名显示为乱码（如 UR...
